action.reasoning: Observation: First iteration, empty workspace, no prior results. Analysis: Need baseline pipeline with simple MLP (suitable for per-column regression on normalized 124->128 vectors), quick training (2 epochs) to validate data loading/predict contract and measure iter time before longer runs. Decision: Create model.py (MLP), train.py (DataLoader+Adam+MSE, log only to metrics.jsonl, save ckpt), predict.py (argparse+load+infer), run training then submit_eval on the checkpoint.
